title: Advantage Home Construction Insurance ransomware incident

extortion.description: Advantage Home Construction Insurance (AHCI) provides warranties and construction insurance, operating nationally with offices in St. Helens, Huddersfield, London, Birmingham, Belfast and Horsham, offering construction-related insurance and services designed to provide clients with peace of mind.We are ready to upload more than 110 GB od essential corporate documents such as: insurance documents, confidential licenses, agreements and contracts, passports and other employee and customer documents, internal correspondence, financial data (audits, payment details, reports), contact numbers and e-mail addresses of employees and customers, etc.
